entry.menu.title: LongLive
entry.menu.body: Confirm to open compatibility settings. Cancel to view diagnostics.
panel.overview.intro: LongLive is loaded in the current game session. Use the left navigation to check feature status, compatibility options, and diagnostics.
panel.compatibility.hint: Use the bottom buttons to toggle compatibility options directly from this panel.
panel.demo_map.intro: This page shows the built-in example map. Right now it is mainly used to confirm that the example map is ready and can be entered, returned from, and exported correctly.
panel.demo_map.hint: Use the bottom-right buttons to refresh the example map check or export the current example map details.
diagnostics.title: LongLive Diagnostics
diagnostics.custom_runtime_scene_registe: Active scene registered in custom runtime
diagnostics.custom_runtime_activation_pe: Runtime targets still waiting for activation work
diagnostics.local_mods_unresolved_explai: The game's local mod test folder could not be found. Usually this means the current session did not start through the local mod test path, or Next did not provide that path.
diagnostics.content_backend_deferred_exp: The current content backend is still Deferred. LongLive is recording and forwarding content requests, but it is not directly loading content yet.
diagnostics.bridge_not_reported_explaine: Bridge has not reported its status back to Host yet. Usually this means only Host was loaded in this session, the local-test Next Bridge was not started, or its script path has not been triggered yet.
compatibility.easybatch.missing_method: EasyBatch.Plugin was detected, but Update could not be resolved.
compatibility.easybatch.redirect_install: EasyBatch.Update redirect is installed and owned by LongLive.
compatibility.easybatch.redirect_pending: EasyBatch.Plugin.Update is available, but the LongLive redirect did not finish installing.
compatibility.easybatch.source_missing: EasyBatch.Plugin was not detected in the current host runtime.
compatibility.whiteze.registered_present: WhiteZe-style Next routing/query adapters were registered, and the reference WhiteZe runtime surface is present.
compatibility.whiteze.registered_missing: WhiteZe-style Next routing/query adapters were registered, but the reference WhiteZe runtime surface was not detected in the current host.
compatibility.whiteze.next_unavailable: WhiteZe-style Next routing/query adapters were skipped because Next runtime command/query registration is unavailable.
compatibility.vtools.registered_present: VTools-style Next routing/query adapters were registered, and the reference VTools runtime surface is present.
compatibility.vtools.registered_missing: VTools-style Next routing/query adapters were registered, but the reference VTools runtime surface was not detected in the current host.
compatibility.vtools.next_unavailable: VTools-style Next routing/query adapters were skipped because Next runtime command/query registration is unavailable.
compatibility.menu.title: Compatibility Settings
compatibility.menu.summary: Toggle compatibility features below. Most changes apply immediately. EasyBatch-related changes take effect the next time that feature runs.
compatibility.menu.toggle_hint: Click the LongLive entry again after changing values to refresh this panel.
compatibility.menu.step_easybatch: Confirm to toggle EasyBatch compatibility. Cancel to keep it unchanged and continue.
compatibility.menu.step_whiteze: Confirm to toggle WhiteZe Tools compatibility. Cancel to keep it unchanged and continue.
compatibility.menu.step_vtools: Confirm to toggle VTools compatibility. Cancel to finish without changing it.
bridge.host_missing_tip: LongLive Host is missing. Install LongLive Host into BepInEx/plugins.
bridge.host_incompatible_tip: LongLive Host is installed, but this Bridge needs a newer compatible Host build.
config.enable_debug_logging.name: Enable Debug Logging
config.enable_debug_logging.desc: Write more logs to help with troubleshooting.
config.enable_content_runtime_inspection: Check Next content interfaces at startup and write the result to the log.
config.enable_native_probe.name: Enable Native Probe
config.enable_native_probe.desc: Try to connect to the native core at startup and write the result to the log.
config.native_library_path.name: Native Library Path
config.native_library_path.desc: Optional explicit path to longlive_native_core.dll. Leave empty to use default discovery.
config.enable_map_trace.name: Enable Map Trace
config.enable_map_trace.desc: Write scene loads, map nodes, and world map state to the log. Requires debug logging.
config.enable_map_trace_verbose.name: Enable Verbose Map Trace
config.enable_map_trace_verbose.desc: Write more detailed map logs such as node info and map snapshots. Requires debug logging and map trace.
config.enable_map_overview_runtime_loggi: Write world map pages, regions, and route info to the log. Requires debug logging.
config.enable_map_overview_runtime_verbo: Write more detailed world map logs. Requires debug logging and overview runtime logging.
config.enable_custom_map_runtime_logging: Write custom map scenes, entry points, and match results to the log. Requires debug logging.
config.enable_custom_map_runtime_verbose: Write more detailed custom map logs. Requires debug logging and custom map runtime logging.
config.enable_auto_export_scene_routing_: Automatically export the current scene planning file. Requires debug logging.
config.enable_scene_local_topology_loggi: Write in-scene node links and bindings to the log. Requires debug logging.
config.enable_scene_local_topology_verbo: Write more detailed in-scene node information. Requires debug logging and scene-local topology logging.
config.enable_auto_export_map_snapshot.d: Automatically export the current map snapshot. Requires debug logging.
config.enable_battle_trace.name: Enable Battle Trace
config.enable_battle_trace.desc: Write battle entry, round flow, and skill use to the log. Requires debug logging.
config.enable_battle_trace_verbose.name: Enable Verbose Battle Trace
config.enable_battle_trace_verbose.desc: Write more detailed battle logs. Requires debug logging and battle trace.
Try to stop extra damage processing after a target is already down.
config.enable_bulk_item_use_optimization: Reduce stutter when using large batches of pills or items.
config.bulk_item_use_chunk_size.name: Bulk Item Chunk Size
config.bulk_item_use_chunk_size.desc: Maximum number of use actions processed per frame during bulk use.
config.bulk_item_use_frame_budget_ms.des: Maximum number of milliseconds spent per frame during bulk use.
config.enable_pop_tip_optimization.name: Enable Pop-tip Optimization
config.enable_pop_tip_optimization.desc: Merge repeated prompts and clear them faster.
config.pop_tip_aggregation_window_ms.des: Repeated prompts inside this window are merged into one summary entry, in milliseconds.
config.pop_tip_fast_mode_threshold.name: Pop-tip Fast Mode Threshold
config.pop_tip_fast_mode_threshold.desc: When prompt count reaches this value, a faster cleanup mode is used.
config.enable_tujian_pinyin_search.name: Enable TuJian Pinyin Search
config.enable_tujian_pinyin_search.desc: Add pinyin-aware matching to the TuJian search path.
config.enable_fade_optimization.name: Enable Fade Optimization
config.enable_fade_optimization.desc: Shorten some black-screen transitions and scene changes.
config.enable_zero_time_move_npc_refresh: Refresh nearby NPC lists even when a map move consumes no time, to reduce stale NPC panels caused by high move speed or zero-time movement mods.
config.fade_duration_scale.name: Fade Duration Scale
config.fade_duration_scale.desc: Supported fade and transition durations are multiplied by this scale. Lower values are faster.
config.map_door_transition_seconds.name: Map Door Transition Seconds
config.map_door_transition_seconds.desc: Some map entry transitions use this black-screen duration in seconds.
config.enable_easybatch_compatibility.de: Help avoid conflicts when EasyBatch is installed.
config.enable_whiteze_compatibility.name: Enable WhiteZe Compatibility
config.enable_whiteze_compatibility.desc: Enable compatibility support for WhiteZe Tools.
config.enable_vtools_compatibility.name: Enable VTools Compatibility
Load sample commands at startup. Mainly for development and testing.
config.enable_demo_query_registration.de: Load sample queries at startup. Mainly for development and testing.
config.enable_demo_map_registration.name: Enable Demo Map Registration
config.enable_demo_map_registration.desc: Load the built-in example map at startup. Mainly for development and testing.
config.enable_json_mod_demo_install.name: Enable JSON Demo Install
config.enable_json_mod_demo_install.desc: Load the example JSON content pack at startup.
config.json_mod_demo_path.name: JSON Demo Path
config.json_mod_demo_path.desc: Folder path of the example JSON content pack.
config.content_backend.name: Content Backend
config.content_backend.desc: Loading mode used by JSON content packs. Most players do not need to change this.
